_comment: Railway template config for cyntr-try. Import via 'New Project > Deploy from GitHub' then point at this file. Railway will read the build + deploy stanzas and provision a Dockerfile-built service.

deploy._comment: Cyntr exposes 7700; Railway auto-detects via PORT env, but we override the listen address explicitly so the binary doesn't fall back to localhost.

_envVars._comment: Set these in the Railway dashboard under Variables. Secrets stay out of this file.

optional.CYNTR_API_KEY: bearer token to gate the public API

_volumes._comment: Attach a Railway Volume to /cyntr/data via the dashboard. SQLite stores won't persist across deploys without it.

_costEstimate._comment: Railway charges per-resource-second. Trickle traffic on the smallest pod:
_costEstimate.breakdown: 0.5 vCPU * 512 MB * 24h * 30d = $5-7/mo. Volume adds ~$0.25/GB-mo. No free tier as of 2026, but $5/mo credit on the Hobby plan covers a small cyntr-try.
